headline: My Resume!
summary: This section highlights my foundation in computer science with applied experience across embedded systems, IoT, and web development. It combines academic training with hands-on project work, emphasizing system-level thinking, efficient software design, and real-world hardware/software integration.

items: Embedded C/C++ development, especially on microcontrollers (ESP32, Raspberry Pi)
Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) communication and data transfer
IoT system design and hardware-software integration
Full-stack web development using Node.js, JavaScript, and MySQL
Object-oriented programming in Java, C++, and Python
RESTful API design and backend architecture
Version control with Git and collaborative workflows
Development across Windows, Linux, and macOS environments

education.program: Bachelor of Science, Computer Science (ABET Accredited)
